evals.prompt: Design a logo for a tech startup called 'Luminary' that builds AI-powered analytics tools. Make it modern and memorable.
evals.expected_output: Generates a logo in one of 55 available styles using Gemini AI, provides SVG and PNG export, and explains the style choice in relation to the brand personality.

assertions.text: Selects a specific logo style from the 55-style library with documented reasoning for 'tech/AI/analytics' brand positioning
Uses Gemini AI to generate the visual element and produces SVG output
Provides at least 2–3 logo concept variations for the client to choose from
Includes PNG export alongside SVG for immediate usability
Documents the visual reasoning: icon metaphor, typography choice, and color selection

evals.prompt: Create a complete corporate identity program for a consultancy firm named 'Meridian Partners'. Include all standard deliverables.
evals.expected_output: Produces a CIP with 50 standard deliverables including stationery, branded templates, signage mockups, and digital assets, plus CIP mockup previews.

assertions.text: References the 50-deliverable CIP checklist and tracks completion of each item
Generates CIP mockup previews for key deliverables (business card, letterhead, email signature)
Applies consistent brand colors, typography, and logo usage across all deliverables
Provides a branded deliverables package with organized file naming and folder structure
Includes digital and print variants where applicable (RGB vs CMYK, screen vs print resolution)

evals.prompt: Create an icon set for a project management app — I need icons for tasks, calendar, users, notifications, and settings.
evals.expected_output: Generates 5 SVG icons in a consistent style chosen from the 15 available styles, with scalable vector output and a coherent visual language across the set.

assertions.text: Selects a single icon style from the 15-style library and applies it consistently across all 5 icons
Produces SVG output for each icon that is clean, scalable, and pixel-aligned at common sizes (16, 24, 32px)
Maintains visual coherence: stroke weight, corner radius, and proportions match across the set
Documents the style choice and visual system so additional icons can be added consistently
Provides icons in a format usable in web projects without manual cleanup

evals.prompt: Generate Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X social media photos announcing our new product launch.
evals.expected_output: Creates platform-specific social media images with correct dimensions for each network using HTML→screenshot workflow, brand-appropriate copywriting, and visual hierarchy.

assertions.text: Uses platform-specific dimensions: 1080×1080 for Instagram, 1200×627 for LinkedIn, 1600×900 for Twitter/X
Uses the HTML→screenshot workflow rather than generating raster images directly
Applies design tokens for brand-consistent colors, fonts, and spacing across all three images
Includes platform-appropriate visual hierarchy and copywriting tone for each network
Produces ready-to-post output without requiring manual resizing or editing

evals.prompt: Create a 10-slide HTML presentation for a pitch deck. The company is in renewable energy and needs an impactful visual treatment.
evals.expected_output: Generates a 10-slide HTML presentation with Chart.js visualizations, renewable-energy-appropriate visual treatment, responsive layouts, and design token application.

assertions.text: Generates a complete HTML file with all 10 slides in a responsive, browser-renderable format
Applies a visual style appropriate for renewable energy (earthy tones, clean/minimal, nature-inspired palette)
Includes at least one Chart.js data visualization slide relevant to energy metrics
Uses design tokens for typographic hierarchy, spacing, and color consistently across all slides
Varies slide layout types — cover, data, two-column, and closing — rather than repeating the same layout
